requirement_topic.en: EAEU TR CU 004/2011 Low-Voltage Safety for EV Chargers
requirement_topic.zh: EAEU TR CU 004/2011 电动汽车充电设备低压安全
requirement_topic.zht: EAEU TR CU 004/2011 電動汽車充電設備低壓安全

summary.en: Kazakhstan participates in the Eurasian Economic Union conformity system, so EV charging equipment placed on the Kazakhstan market may need EAC conformity assessment where it falls within TR CU 004/2011 for low-voltage equipment. The dossier should address electrical shock protection, insulation, overheating, mechanical hazards, marking, instructions, and conformity documentation for the exact AC or DC charger configuration.
summary.zh: 哈萨克斯坦参与欧亚经济联盟合格评定体系，因此投放哈萨克斯坦市场的电动汽车充电设备在落入TR CU 004/2011低压设备范围时，可能需要EAC合格评定。资料包应覆盖具体交流或直流充电设备配置的防触电、绝缘、过热、机械危险、标识、说明书和合格证明文件。
summary.zht: 哈薩克斯坦參與歐亞經濟聯盟合格評定體系，因此投放哈薩克斯坦市場的電動汽車充電設備在落入TR CU 004/2011低壓設備範圍時，可能需要EAC合格評定。資料包應覆蓋具體交流或直流充電設備配置的防觸電、絕緣、過熱、機械危險、標識、說明書和合格證明文件。

standards_or_laws: TR CU 004/2011 On safety of low-voltage equipment
EAEU conformity assessment and EAC marking rules
Kazakhstan import and market-surveillance requirements for products in EAEU technical-regulation scope

summary.en: Chinese EV charger safety evidence commonly includes GB/T 18487.1, GB/T 18487.2 where applicable, GB/T 27930 for DC communication where applicable, factory safety tests, CB or IEC reports, and component certificates. This evidence can support the EAC dossier but is not an EAC certificate or declaration by itself.
summary.zh: 中国电动汽车充电设备安全证据通常包括GB/T 18487.1、适用时的GB/T 18487.2、适用时的GB/T 27930直流通信、工厂安全测试、CB或IEC报告以及部件证书。这些证据可支持EAC资料包，但本身不是EAC证书或声明。
summary.zht: 中國電動汽車充電設備安全證據通常包括GB/T 18487.1、適用時的GB/T 18487.2、適用時的GB/T 27930直流通訊、工廠安全測試、CB或IEC報告以及部件證書。這些證據可支持EAC資料包，但本身不是EAC證書或聲明。

gap.en: Confirm product scope, voltage rating, charger type, and EAC route before shipment. Prepare Russian-language and, where required, Kazakh-language labels and manuals, safety risk analysis, bill of materials, test reports, certificate or declaration route documents, and importer authorization.
gap.zh: 出货前应确认产品范围、电压等级、充电设备类型和EAC路径。应准备俄文以及在被要求时的哈萨克文标签和手册、安全风险分析、物料清单、测试报告、证书或声明路径文件以及进口商授权。
gap.zht: 出貨前應確認產品範圍、電壓等級、充電設備類型和EAC路徑。應準備俄文以及在被要求時的哈薩克文標籤和手冊、安全風險分析、物料清單、測試報告、證書或聲明路徑文件以及進口商授權。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the charger is within TR CU 004/2011 scope and is placed on the Kazakhstan / EAEU market
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or procurement-specific depending on Chinese product category, charger configuration, and project route

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] China GB/T safety evidence supports technical review, but Kazakhstan market placement may require an EAEU low-voltage conformity route and EAC marking where TR CU 004/2011 applies.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T安全证据可支持技术审查，但在TR CU 004/2011适用时，哈萨克斯坦市场投放可能需要EAEU低压合格评定路径和EAC标志。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T安全證據可支持技術審查，但在TR CU 004/2011適用時，哈薩克斯坦市場投放可能需要EAEU低壓合格評定路徑和EAC標誌。
